_comment: Copy this file to stake_session.json and fill in your real values. Harvest the kpsdk_* headers from your browser's devtools (Network tab → any graphql request → Request Headers).
_important_notes: Kasada headers (x-kpsdk-*) expire after ~10-30 minutes. You must refresh them periodically.
To harvest: open stake.com in your browser, log in, open devtools (F12), go to Network tab, click any graphql request, copy the 4 x-kpsdk-* headers from Request Headers.
The session cookie is also needed — copy the value of the 'session' cookie from Application > Cookies > stake.com.
cf_clearance is the Cloudflare clearance cookie — also in Application > Cookies.
DO NOT commit stake_session.json to git (it's in .gitignore).
For fully autonomous operation, consider implementing BrowserSessionProvider in stake_api.py (uses Playwright to harvest headers automatically).
